title: GROUP BY query can lead to nullpointer in sesame
key_bug_features: GROUP BY query causing NullPointerException in sesame
bug_features_seed: SELECT ?graph (COUNT(?s) AS ?inGraph) WHERE { VALUES (?graph) { (<http://example.org/graph1>) (<http://example.org/graph2>) } GRAPH ?graph { ?s ?p ?o } } GROUP BY ?graph;
